name: Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Stir with a spoon no more than fifty times, or until smooth.
2. The batter will be thin but will thicken as it stands.
3. Cover the bowl with a towel and place it in a warm place for 30 to 45 minutes, or until the batter is bubbly and thick.
4. Bake in a nonstick waffle iron on low heat, 5 to 7 minutes. (The iron can be lightly seasoned with liquid lecithin or oil if necessary.)
